steps.title: Use the similarity order
steps.content: In the similarity statement, the corresponding vertices are listed in order. For triangle $CAE$ similar to triangle $CBD$, vertex $A$ corresponds to vertex $B$.

steps.title: Match corresponding angles
steps.content:
Corresponding angles in similar triangles are equal, so angle $CAE$ has the same measure as angle $CBD$. Since angle $CBD$ measures $56^\circ$, angle $CAE$ also measures $56^\circ$.
The answer is B.
